overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a futuristic industrial waterfront at dusk in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves along a wet dockside road past industrial warehouses, approaches and passes a couple embracing by the water, continues along a cargo ship beneath a large gantry crane, and enters a darker covered shipping container storage area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront approach road with warehouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a wet asphalt road toward the waterfront, flanked by industrial warehouses and chain-link fencing

entered.detail: large corrugated metal industrial building with multiple stories and external piping
overhead electrical cables and utility poles spanning the road
metal security fencing running parallel to the road on the left side
tall factory chimneys emitting smoke visible against the dusk sky
distant mountain silhouette visible on the horizon beyond the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial road at dusk, with the camera moving forward toward a waterfront. Industrial warehouses line the left side behind chain-link fencing, while distant smokestacks and mountains frame the horizon. The wet asphalt reflects the dim blue hour light, creating a moody atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with docked cargo ship

events.description: reaches the waterfront edge where the road meets the dockside walkway

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a couple standing at the water's edge, then continuing along the dock

notable_agents.action: couple embracing and looking out over the water, standing still as the camera passes

entered.detail: large red and white cargo vessel docked at the pier with visible hull markings
concrete barrier and walkway marking the transition from road to dock
massive industrial crane structure with red warning lights spanning across the dock

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the waterfront and passes a couple embracing by the water's edge. A massive cargo ship comes into view on the right, docked alongside the concrete promenade. The large gantry crane structure becomes visible ahead, marking the transition to the active dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dockside walkway between cargo ship and industrial warehouse

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dockside path between the massive cargo ship and the industrial warehouse building

entered.detail: tall concrete industrial structure with external ventilation units and neon signage
full moon visible in the dusky sky above the gantry crane

segments.scene_description: Walking along the confined dockside path with the massive cargo ship now on the left and a concrete industrial building on the right. The camera approaches the illuminated gantry crane structure while the moon hangs visible overhead. The wet pavement continues to reflect the industrial lighting and dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shipping container storage corridor beneath industrial overpass

events.description: passes under the gantry crane into a darker covered corridor with stacked shipping containers

agents.ego_description: entering the covered industrial area and continuing through the narrow corridor between shipping containers

entered.detail: stacked blue and brown metal shipping containers creating narrow corridor walls
large industrial ventilation fan mounted on the right wall
massive concrete and steel industrial overpass blocking the sky above

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the gantry crane into a dimly lit, enclosed industrial corridor. Stacked shipping containers line both sides of the narrow concrete path, with large ventilation fans and overhead pipes visible. The lighting shifts to artificial sources as the natural dusk light is blocked by the overhead industrial structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open industrial road at dusk into the claustrophobic depths of a covered shipping terminal. It begins by gliding along a wet asphalt road lined with chain-link fences and warehouses, with distant smokestacks and mountains framing the horizon under a dim blue hour light. As the camera reaches the waterfront, it passes a couple embracing by the water's edge before the view opens up to reveal a massive docked cargo ship and a towering gantry crane ahead. The scene then shifts into a confined dockside path between the ship and a concrete building, moving under the moonlit sky toward the illuminated crane structure. Finally, the camera passes beneath the crane into a dimly lit, enclosed corridor where the natural dusk light is replaced by artificial sources reflecting off stacked shipping containers, overhead pipes, and large ventilation fans.
